sql:
CREATE TABLE dim_period_rate (
    period_rate_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    period_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    rate_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    uf_value REAL,
    uf_known_value REAL,
    uf_estimated_value REAL,
    monthly_projection_rate REAL,
    source_policy TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DB_RULES_GENERATOR',
    approval_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    notes TEXT,
    created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    updated_at TEXT,
    UNIQUE (period_id, rate_type),
    FOREIGN KEY (period_id) REFERENCES dim_period(period_id),
    CHECK (rate_type IN ('MONTH_END_CONFIRMED', 'MONTH_END_ESTIMATED', 'TOTAL_MARKER', 'SEPARATOR')),
    CHECK (source_policy IN ('DB_RULES_GENERATOR', 'ROOT_CONFIRMED_AFTER_ADMIN_APPROVAL')),
    CHECK (approval_status IN ('DRAFT', 'REQUESTED', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED'))
)

    CHECK (status IN ('DRAFT', 'ACTIVE', 'REVIEW', 'INACTIVE'))
)

sql:
CREATE TABLE report_dependency_staging_value (
    staging_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    run_id TEXT,
    period_id TEXT,
    report_id TEXT NOT NULL,
    workbook_code TEXT NOT NULL,
    sheet_name TEXT NOT NULL,
    cell_address TEXT NOT NULL,
    metric_code TEXT,
    metric_name TEXT,
    value_numeric REAL,
    value_text TEXT,
    value_date TEXT,
    formula_text TEXT,
    unit TEXT,
    source_policy TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DB_RULES_GENERATOR',
    review_status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    notes TEXT,
    loaded_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CHECK (review_status IN ('DRAFT', 'REVIEW_REQUIRED', 'APPROVED', 'REJECTED'))
)
CREATE TABLE report_registry(report_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, workbook TEXT NOT NULL, sheet TEXT NOT NULL, section_range TEXT NOT NULL, report_status TEXT NOT NULL)
CREATE TABLE report_run(run_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, report_id TEXT, period_id TEXT, output_workbook TEXT, created_at TEXT)
